global_description: A small, slender bird with a compact body and sharp tail. It features a mix of gray, brown, and orange plumage with a streaked pattern. The bird has a short, conical bill and a distinctive white eye ring. Its wings are rounded, and its legs are thin and dark.

part_details.plumage: Gray and brown with orange hues, streaked pattern

spatial_relations: The sharp tail extends from the compact body
The white eye ring encircles the eye
The short bill is positioned at the front of the head
